nodes.grounding_span: I like collaborating with it much more than delegating

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI as learning tool
nodes.grounding_span: It felt really good to be able to accomplish that task

nodes.label: Resigned acceptance of workplace AI restrictions

nodes.label: Optimistic hope for future secure AI instances

nodes.label: Iterative verification and multi-step checking
nodes.grounding_span: I manually check it myself and I check it again when I try to run it in my real context

nodes.label: Context-dependent tool use based on energy and interest
nodes.grounding_span: It also depends on how I feel at the moment
